title: LEX - LEAD Message Schema
description: Schema for LEAD message type - lead information with full lifecycle support

leadType.description: Type of lead - PRIMARY, CART, TEST_DRIVE, POST_ORDER, CROSS_SELL, etc.

leadCreatedDate.description: When this lead was originally created

leadVersion.description: Version number for this lead (incremented on significant updates)

parentOrderId.description: For POST_ORDER leads: ID of the original purchase order this lead is related to

parentLeadId.description: For child leads: ID of parent lead (e.g., test drive → full lead)

relatedOrderIds.description: For cross-sell/accessory leads: IDs of related purchase orders

relatedLeadIds.description: Child leads spawned from this lead (e.g., accessories after main vehicle order)

leadAncestry.description: Tracks the complete path of this lead from origin to current state

originSourceId.description: ID in original system (e.g., cart ID, test drive ID)

conversionPath.description: Breadcrumb trail: CART → TEST_DRIVE → SHOPPING → ORDER → DELIVERED

leadHistory.description: Complete timeline of all lead updates - allows tracking non-linear progression

changedBy.description: System or user that made the change

reason.description: Reason for status change (e.g., customer withdrew, reconsidered, redirected to different product)

dataChanged.description: Fields that changed in this update

cartValue.description: Total cart value at lead capture

testDriveVehicleVIN.description: VIN of vehicle used in test drive

relatedOrderId.description: For post-order leads: originating order ID

phoneNumbers.description: Structured multi-entry phone list. Supersedes phoneNumber when multiple entries are needed. phoneNumber is retained for backward compatibility.

bestTime.description: Best time to reach customer on this number

preferred.description: Set true for exactly one entry — the primary contact number

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for this number

preferredContactTime.description: Preferred time window for being contacted

addresses.description: Multi-typed address list. Supersedes address when multiple address types are needed. address is retained for backward compatibility.

primary.description: Set true for exactly one entry

creditTier.description: Self-reported or soft-pull derived credit bracket — determines lender and rate tier routing before formal credit application submission

fleetBuyer.description: Fleet purchase context — populated when customer is procuring 5+ units. Routes lead away from retail F&I queue to fleet desk.

fleetSize.description: Total size of customer's existing fleet

unitsToOrder.description: Number of units in this specific procurement

buyerType.description: Buyer classification. Populate organizationBuyer when ORGANIZATION. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY

organizationBuyer.description: B2B / government buyer details. Populated when buyerType=ORGANIZATION. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY §2

desiredProduct.description: Desired product specifications — works across all asset classes.

make.description: Manufacturer / brand name (e.g. Toyota, Airbus, Boeing)

bodyStyle.description: Body style (e.g. COUPE, SEDAN, SUV, HATCHBACK)

features.description: Desired feature list — flat strings. Use featurePreferences[] when priority weighting is needed.

featurePreferences.description: Weighted feature preference list. Extends features[] with priority signals. +100 = essential to have, -100 = essential to NOT have, 0 = indifferent. Applies across all industries: automotive options, aircraft avionics, property amenities, equipment attachments, software capabilities. Directly corresponds to ADF <option><weighting> but generalized for all asset classes.

feature.description: Feature or option name (e.g. 'Keyless Entry', 'APU', 'Swimming Pool', 'MDM Enrollment', 'Crane Attachment')

weighting.description: +100 = essential to have. -100 = essential to NOT have. 0 = no preference. Matches ADF weighting range.

category.description: Optional grouping label (e.g. SAFETY, COMFORT, PERFORMANCE, TECHNOLOGY, AVIONICS, AMENITY)

colorPreferences.description: Ranked exterior/interior color combinations in order of preference. Rank 1 = most preferred. Applicable to automotive, maritime (vessel livery), custom-built assets, and aviation interiors. Directly corresponds to ADF <colorcombination><preference>.

interior.description: Interior / cabin color or material name

priceOffer.description: Structured price expression with semantic type. Provides richer intent than budgetMin/budgetMax alone. Directly corresponds to ADF <price> with type, delta, relativeTo, and source attributes, extended for all asset classes.

type.description: Semantic type of this price expression: OFFER = what buyer is willing to pay; APPRAISAL = assessed value; LIST = seller's listed price

delta.description: How amount relates to relativeTo. PERCENTAGE: amount=2 means 2% above relativeTo value.

relativeTo.description: Reference point for delta calculation (e.g. 2% above invoice).

source.description: Source of price data (e.g. 'Kelley Blue Book', 'RICS Valuation', 'JD Power', 'AVAC')

validUntil.description: Date until which this price offer or appraisal is considered valid

installedOptions.description: Options/accessories already installed on the target vehicle. Distinct from featurePreferences[] (what the customer wants). Source classification determines MSRP inclusion, warranty scope, and appraisal treatment.

name.description: Option or accessory name (e.g. 'Tow Package', 'Paint Protection Film', 'OEM Navigation')

source.description: OEM_FACTORY = included in MSRP; DEALER_INSTALLED = added by dealer post-build; AFTERMARKET = non-OEM third party

factoryOrderPreference.description: Factory order eligibility — FACTORY_ORDER_PREFERRED triggers allocation request and production scheduling workflow (6–16 week lead time)

vehiclePreferences.description: Legacy / backward-compat bag for older producers

tradeInOdometerStatus.description: Odometer reading integrity — required for compliant title disclosure (49 CFR Part 580). A bare mileage integer is legally insufficient without this qualifier.

tradeInTitleStatus.description: Title brand — salvage/flood/lemon titles disqualify trade-ins from most captive lender programs and trigger separate appraisal workflows

tradeInPayoffAmount.description: Remaining loan balance owed on the trade-in — gap between payoff and ACV determines negative equity that rolls into the new deal structure

tradeInPreviousOwnerCount.description: Number of prior titled owners — affects ACV and CPO program eligibility (most OEM CPO programs require ≤2 prior owners)

tradeInAccidentHistory.description: Accident history disclosure for the trade-in vehicle

airbagDeployment.description: At least one airbag deployed — reduces ACV 15–40% and affects CPO eligibility

frameOrStructuralDamage.description: Frame or structural damage recorded — triggers separate high-value appraisal path

tradeInVehicleHistoryReport.description: Vehicle history report reference — enables downstream DMS/lender to retrieve without re-pulling and incurring duplicate fees

relatedProducts.description: Post-order related products and accessories (for CROSS_SELL, ACCESSORY, PROTECTION_PLAN, SUBSCRIPTION leads)

accessories.description: Vehicle accessories and add-ons (seat packages, wheels, paint protection, audio upgrades, etc.)

accessoryId.description: Unique identifier for the accessory in platform inventory

protectionPlans.description: Protection plans and warranty extensions (extended warranty, gap insurance, maintenance plans, road hazard protection)

planId.description: Unique identifier for the protection plan

subscriptions.description: Recurring subscription services (telematics, charging network, navigation updates, roadside assistance, in-vehicle wifi)

subscriptionId.description: Unique identifier for the subscription service

initialDuration.description: Initial subscription commitment in months (0 = month-to-month)

retailerInstalledOptions.description: Retailer-specific installed options and customizations (aftermarket upgrades, local retailer add-ons)

serviceUpgrades.description: Service-related upgrades (premium oil changes, detailing packages, loaner vehicle program)

assignedTo.description: Staff member or agent assigned to handle this lead. In automotive: internet sales manager or salesperson. In real estate: buyer's agent or listing agent. In aviation/maritime/enterprise: account manager or sales engineer. Completes the ADF <vendor><contact> capability gap.

role.description: e.g. INTERNET_SALES_MANAGER, BUYER_AGENT, LISTING_AGENT, ACCOUNT_MANAGER, SALES_ENGINEER, BROKER

organisationId.description: LEX org ID of the assigning organisation

purchaseTimeframe.description: Customer-stated purchase window — when they intend to buy or complete a transaction. Distinct from metadata.expirationDate, which is a system-level lead TTL. Directly corresponds to ADF <timeframe><earliestdate>/<latestdate>.

description.description: Free-text description (e.g. 'Within 1 month', 'Before end of Q2 2026')

earliestDate.description: Earliest date the customer intends to complete the purchase

latestDate.description: Latest date the customer intends to complete the purchase

urgency.description: Machine-readable urgency tier derived from dates or customer statement

aviationLead.description: Aviation-specific lead context. Populate when desiredProduct.assetClass = AVIATION.

operatorCertificate.description: Operator's regulatory certificate — determines which aircraft category can be legally operated

intendedUse.description: Intended operational structure — dry/wet leases involve different parties and contractual frameworks; ACMI requires a licensed operator entity

importExportJurisdiction.description: Cross-registry intent — triggers Export Certificate of Airworthiness and bilateral airworthiness agreement verification

maritimeLead.description: Maritime-specific lead context. Populate when desiredProduct.assetClass = MARITIME.

charterType.description: Charter form determines operational responsibility and legal structure — cannot be interchanged in a lead queue

intendedTradingArea.description: Intended trading area with any exclusions — affects class notation requirements, insurance cover, war risk endorsements, and ECA fuel compliance

intendedCargoType.description: Primary intended cargo type — used to verify vessel cargo compatibility against last cargo history

heavyEquipmentLead.description: Heavy equipment-specific lead context. Populate when desiredProduct.assetClass = HEAVY_EQUIPMENT.

attachmentCouplerStandard.description: Required hydraulic coupler standard — mismatches require adapter kits ($1,500–$8,000) or make attachments completely incompatible

jobSiteAltitude.description: Job site altitude in meters above sea level — diesel engines lose ~3% power per 300m; machines above 3,000m require de-rating or special configuration

exportLicenseRequired.description: Machine being exported across customs borders — triggers OEM export compliance review before release order

realEstateLead.description: Real estate-specific lead context. Populate when desiredProduct is real property (productType = GENERAL_PROCUREMENT and asset is a property).

buyerRepresentationAgreementStatus.description: NAR settlement compliance — effective August 2024, buyer agents must execute representation agreement before showing properties

exchangeType.description: Tax exchange classification — 1031 exchange imposes strict IRS deadlines (45-day identification, 180-day close) and requires a Qualified Intermediary

preApprovalDetails.description: Buyer mortgage pre-approval — first document sellers require; loan type determines concession limits and property condition requirements

contingencies.description: Offer contingencies — core milestone tracking; an offer without structured contingencies cannot drive escrow routing

sellerConcessions.description: Concessions requested from seller — present in 40–60% of US offers; affects appraisal net price and FHA/VA lender caps

homeWarrantyRequest.description: Home warranty terms — standard US offer line item; lost without a structured field during CRM-to-escrow handoff

propertyDisclosures.description: Material property disclosures — discovering these post-contract collapses deals in escrow

asIsSale.description: Property sold without repair obligations — affects FHA/VA financing eligibility

titleSeasoningFlag.description: Title transferred within 90 days — may trigger FHA/VA title seasoning hold

technologyLead.description: Technology/device-specific lead context. Populate when desiredProduct.assetClass = TECHNOLOGY or TELECOM.

securityCertificationRequirements.description: Required device or vendor security certifications — gate criterion for government and regulated enterprise procurement

evergreenRefreshTrigger.description: DaaS contract refresh trigger — different triggers produce fundamentally different cost structures and risk allocation

evergreenRefreshThreshold.description: Threshold value for the selected refresh trigger (e.g. '80%' battery SoH, '36 months' for calendar)

sustainabilityRequirements.description: Required ecolabel certifications — legally mandatory for US federal procurement (Executive Order 13514) and EU public sector

conflictMineralsComplianceRequired.description: Requires Section 1502 (Dodd-Frank) conflict minerals declaration and RoHS/WEEE compliance documentation

consentRecord.description: Regulatory consent record. Required for all leads containing PII. Spec: LEX_CONSENT_MODEL

tcpa.description: US TCPA (Telephone Consumer Protection Act) consent

ukGdpr.description: UK GDPR / Data Protection Act 2018 consent (applies to GB customers)

usStatePrivacy.description: US State Privacy Laws (Virginia CDPA, Colorado CPA, Connecticut CTDPA, Texas TDPSA, Montana MCDPA, Oregon OCPA, and others)

statesOptedOut.description: US state codes where customer has opted out

dpdp.description: India Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (DPDPA) consent

pipl.description: China Personal Information Protection Law (Nov 2021) consent

lgpd.description: Brazil LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados) consent

popia.description: South Africa POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act, Jul 2021) consent

pdpaSg.description: Singapore PDPA (Personal Data Protection Act 2012, amended 2020) consent

appi.description: Japan APPI (Act on Protection of Personal Information, 2022 amendment) consent

nfadp.description: Switzerland nFADP (revised Federal Act on Data Protection, Sep 2023) consent

pipaKr.description: South Korea PIPA-K (Personal Information Protection Act, 2023 amendment) consent

pdplSa.description: Saudi Arabia PDPL (Personal Data Protection Law, effective Mar 2024) consent

pdpaTh.description: Thailand PDPA (Personal Data Protection Act, Jun 2022) consent

consentIpAddress.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address for audit trail

deduplication.description: Deduplication fingerprint and cross-platform linkage. Spec: LEX_DEDUPLICATION

customerFingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex (64 chars). Algorithm: SHA256(email|phone|lastName) all lowercase

duplicateOfLeadId.description: Set if this is a known duplicate of an existing lead

leadIntelligence.description: ML-driven lead scoring and behavioural signals. Spec: LEX_LEAD_INTELLIGENCE

confidenceLevel.description: Overall model confidence. Required when intentScore is present

churnRisk.description: Probability of lead going cold without engagement

leadQualityTier.description: Quality tier derived from intentScore range

scoreTrend.description: Score direction relative to prior evaluation

scoringReasons.description: Top factors driving the score, sorted by weight descending. Max 5 recommended.

factor.description: Machine-readable factor code, e.g. RETURN_VISIT, PAYMENT_CALCULATOR_USED

behavioralSignals.description: Registered behavioral signal codes, e.g. VDP_VIEW_3X, PAYMENT_CALCULATOR_USED

predictedProducts.description: Ranked list of predicted products, sorted by confidenceScore descending

channelAffinity.description: Contact channels ranked by predicted response probability

recommendedResponseSla.description: ISO 8601 duration, e.g. PT2H for 2-hour SLA

enrichmentSources.description: Data provenance: which sources contributed signals to this score

aiInsights.description: GenAI and NLP-produced artefacts: summaries, intent, next-best-actions. Spec: LEX_AI_INSIGHTS

summary.description: LLM-generated narrative summary. MUST NOT contain full PII.

detectedLanguage.description: BCP-47 language code, e.g. en, fr-CA

nextBestActions.description: Recommended seller follow-up actions, sorted by confidence descending

fleetOrder.description: Multi-unit / fleet procurement block. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY §1

partExchange.description: Generic asset part-exchange (any asset class). Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY §4

procurementFinancing.description: B2B / government procurement financing structure. Spec: LEX_MULTI_INDUSTRY §5

deliveryCondition.description: INCOTERMS 2020 (EXW, FCA, CPT, CIP, DAP, DPU, DDP, FAS, FOB, CFR, CIF)

financialSummary.description: Optional structured pricing/tax breakdown. Meaningful only at IN_NEGOTIATION, ORDER, or DELIVERED status. taxesAndFees.isEstimate MUST be true in LEAD messages.

captiveFinance.description: Optional OEM captive lender program snapshot. Meaningful at IN_NEGOTIATION or ORDER. bindingCommitment MUST be false in LEAD messages.

dealLineage.description: Optional append-only audit trail of deal changes across system hops. See specs/LEX_DEAL_LINEAGE.md.

structuredNotes.description: Optional attributed contextual notes. DEALER_INTERNAL visibility must be stripped before forwarding to non-dealer recipients.

FinancialSummary.description: Structured pricing, tax, and fee breakdown. See specs/LEX_FINANCIAL_SUMMARY.md.

netTradeIn.description: tradeInAllowance minus tradeInPayoff. May be negative.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, CAD).

calculatedBy.description: LEX org ID of the system that produced these calculations.

rate.description: Tax rate as decimal (0.0625 = 6.25%). Null for flat fees.

amount.description: Amount for this line item. Negative for credits.

totalTaxesAndFees.description: Sum of all lineItems[].amount. May be negative (net credit).

taxCalculationVersion.description: Tax engine and version identifier. Informational.

isEstimate.description: MUST be true in LEAD messages. Only false valid in LEAD_CLOSURE.

CaptiveFinance.description: OEM captive lender program snapshot. See specs/LEX_CAPTIVE_FINANCE.md.

captiveOrg.description: LEX org ID of the captive lender.

programId.description: Unique program identifier assigned by the captive lender.

programExpiresAt.description: Program expiry. Validators warn if past header.timestamp.

programVersion.description: Version or iteration of the program. Informational.

moneyFactor.description: Money factor (multiply by 2400 for approximate APR equivalent).

residualValuePercent.description: Residual value as percentage of MSRP.

captiveSubventionAmount.description: Dollar value of captive's subsidy built into program. Informational.

appliedIncentivesTotal.description: Sum of all bonusIncentives[].amount. Feeds into financialSummary as a REBATE.

evaluatedBy.description: LEX org ID of the system that evaluated program eligibility.

bindingCommitment.description: MUST be false in LEAD messages. True only in formal loan documents (outside LEX scope).

DealLineage.description: Append-only distributed audit trail of deal changes across system hops. See specs/LEX_DEAL_LINEAGE.md.

version.description: Monotonically increasing count of entries. Incremented each time a system appends.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within this lineage.

systemId.description: LEX organization ID of the appending system.

dealSnapshot.description: Flexible key-value snapshot of deal values at this hop. No rigid sub-schema.

deltaFromPrevious.description: Machine-readable diff. Each key is a field name; value is {from, to, reason}.

StructuredNotes.description: Attributed, categorized context notes. See specs/LEX_DEAL_LINEAGE.md §5.

visibility.description: DEALER_INTERNAL notes MUST be stripped before forwarding to non-dealer recipients.

authorId.description: System user or org ID of the note author.
